Move text overlay updates sourceTextBloc.functional: After moving a text overlay, the associated text blocks update to match the new position
Move text overlay updates sourceTextBloc.technical: OverlayInteractionController.moveOverlay triggers reassociateTextBlocks for text overlays
Move text overlay updates sourceTextBloc.input: 2 far-apart text overlays, move first to cover second's area
Move text overlay updates sourceTextBloc.expectedOutput: sourceTextBlockIds now contains block 2, no longer contains block 1

TC-5b.6: buildOverlayItems with overlay.functional: Text on a figure is classified as overlay-text and gets the correct classification
TC-5b.6: buildOverlayItems with overlay.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems with textClassifications sets textOverlayClassification on overlay text items
TC-5b.6: buildOverlayItems with overlay.input: 1 text block classified as .overlay on figure index 0

TC-5b.7: buildOverlayItems with pageText.functional: Text not on a figure is treated as normal page text with no classification
TC-5b.7: buildOverlayItems with pageText.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems without classification for a text block leaves textOverlayClassification nil
TC-5b.7: buildOverlayItems with pageText.expectedOutput: Text overlay item has textOverlayClassification == nil

TC-5b.8: Overlay-text has associatedFigu.functional: Overlay-text is linked to the figure it sits on for grouped display
TC-5b.8: Overlay-text has associatedFigu.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems sets associatedFigureOverlayId to the figure overlay's UUID
TC-5b.8: Overlay-text has associatedFigu.input: 1 overlay text block on figure index 1 (of 2 figures)

TC-5b.9: Page-text has no associatedFigu.functional: Regular page text is not linked to any figure
TC-5b.9: Page-text has no associatedFigu.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems leaves associatedFigureOverlayId nil for unclassified text

TC-5b.10: Overlay-text is not grouped wi.functional: Text on a figure remains a separate overlay even when spatially close to page text
TC-5b.10: Overlay-text is not grouped wi.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems separates overlay-text from page-text before grouping
TC-5b.10: Overlay-text is not grouped wi.input: 2 close text blocks, 1 classified as overlay, 1 as page text
TC-5b.10: Overlay-text is not grouped wi.expectedOutput: Two separate overlay items with different IDs and classifications

TC-5b.11: Exclude overlay-text → exclude.functional: Excluding overlay-text marks its source blocks as excluded
TC-5b.11: Exclude overlay-text → exclude.technical: OverlayInteractionController.toggleOverlayExclusion on overlay-text adds its sourceTextBlockIds to excludedTextBlockIds
TC-5b.11: Exclude overlay-text → exclude.input: 1 overlay text + 1 page text, exclude overlay text
TC-5b.11: Exclude overlay-text → exclude.expectedOutput: excludedTextBlockIds contains overlay block ID, not page block ID

TC-5b.12: Text without figures → all cla.functional: Without figures, all text blocks are plain page text
TC-5b.12: Text without figures → all cla.technical: OverlayInteractionController.buildOverlayItems without figures produces text overlays with nil classification
TC-5b.12: Text without figures → all cla.expectedOutput: All text overlays have textOverlayClassification == nil and associatedFigureOverlayId == nil

TC-5b.44: Excluding overlay-text updates.functional: Excluding text-on-figure immediately updates both the main preview and the figure thumbnail with the retouched image
TC-5b.44: Excluding overlay-text updates.technical: AppViewModel.toggleOverlayExclusion rebuilds previewImage and FigureDetectionResult.extractedImage for the associated figure when an overlay-text item is excluded
TC-5b.44: Excluding overlay-text updates.input: 1 captured image, 1 figure, 1 overlay-text item on that figure, fake retoucher returns a distinct replacement crop
TC-5b.44: Excluding overlay-text updates.expectedOutput: Preview pixels inside the figure bounds and the figure extractedImage both change to the retouched crop

TC-5b.45: Re-including overlay-text rest.functional: Undoing overlay-text exclusion restores the original figure in both preview and results
TC-5b.45: Re-including overlay-text rest.technical: AppViewModel.toggleOverlayExclusion recomposes previewImage from the original captured image and restores the original figure crop when the overlay-text item is re-included
TC-5b.45: Re-including overlay-text rest.input: 1 captured image, 1 figure, 1 overlay-text item on that figure, exclude then re-include
TC-5b.45: Re-including overlay-text rest.expectedOutput: Preview pixels and figure extractedImage match the original figure crop after re-include

TC-5b.46: Figure exclusion toggle does n.functional: Excluding a figure overlay only changes export inclusion state and does not alter the left preview image
TC-5b.46: Figure exclusion toggle does n.technical: AppViewModel.toggleOverlayExclusion only rebuilds the retouched preview for excluded overlay-text items, not for figure overlays
TC-5b.46: Figure exclusion toggle does n.input: Preview with two figures, toggle exclusion on a figure overlay
TC-5b.46: Figure exclusion toggle does n.expectedOutput: Preview pixels for both figures remain at their original positions and colors

TC-5b.47: Retouching one figure leaves o.functional: Retouching overlay-text on one figure updates only that figure in the left preview and leaves other figures untouched
TC-5b.47: Retouching one figure leaves o.technical: AppViewModel.rebuildRetouchedPreview composites only figures with excluded overlay-text and preserves the preview crop inside unrelated figure bounds
TC-5b.47: Retouching one figure leaves o.input: Preview with two figures, one overlay-text item associated to the first figure, exclude that overlay-text
TC-5b.47: Retouching one figure leaves o.expectedOutput: Target figure bounds change to the retouched crop while the crop inside unrelated figure bounds stays identical

TC-5b.48: FigurePreviewComposer composit.functional: Retouched figure pixels are recomposited back into the intended figure slot in the left preview
TC-5b.48: FigurePreviewComposer composit.technical: FigurePreviewComposer.compositeFigure converts the target rect into CGContext coordinates before drawing the replacement crop, so recomposition stays bound to the requested figureBounds
TC-5b.48: FigurePreviewComposer composit.input: Preview image with two figures and a distinct replacement crop composited into the first figure bounds
TC-5b.48: FigurePreviewComposer composit.expectedOutput: Cropping the recomposited preview at the first figure bounds returns the replacement crop, while the second figure bounds remain unchanged
